title: Creation Idea: Automated Emails + Images

posts.author: bearmana (Andrea)
posts.cookedHtml:
Good morning!
We send many automated emails and notifications for faculty and students. We would like to begin offering reminders and learning opportunities via automations in Monday. The problem we have is these automations can only be made with links to another source. In our experience, if someone has to select a link to learn “the thing”, they won’t select the link.

We would like to embed a graphic into the automation, to attract their attention and focus on the reminders and training. I have attached one of the intended graphics to this message so you can see an example.

Thank you for your consideration! We think this would add immense value to our workflow. I’ve tried all of the other options, but nothing quite works the way we want it to.

Andrea

Five years +1080×1080 162 KB

posts.author: Yash.Gangani (Yash Gangani)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @bearmana

Checkout EasyMails where you can embed Images and customize email template using drag and drop editor.
You can send attachments from board column also.

posts.author: dharmik (Dharmik Jagodana)
posts.cookedHtml: Check out imejis.io if you’re looking to create dynamic and personalized images for every email you send.
